subTitle: Misae prepares a meal to eat but as she tries to do so, Shin-chan causes a nuisance by playing with the food and annoys her.

subTitle: Shin-chan tries to offer his assistance to Misae in preparing their meals for dinner. However, his participation complicates the situation.
